untranslatable_reason: Original signal specifies SMA(30) and SMA(100) for crossover, but allowed indicators only include sma_50 and sma_100 (no sma_30). Also, 'at least 2 consecutive higher highs over past 15 bars' requires bar-by-bar comparison logic (close[i] > close[i-1] for multiple bars) which cannot be expressed with single-bar comparisons. Volume confirmation threshold (0.8 * 15-bar average) cannot be precisely replicated with vol_ratio_20 which uses 20-bar average.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses sma_50 as closest approximation to sma_30, and vol_ratio_20 as proxy for volume threshold. The consecutive higher highs requirement and precise volume multiplier logic are not translatable to allowed operators. Signal direction inferred as LONG (trend-following in uptrend). Hold period set to 15 bars as specified in exit conditions.
